title: Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple
tagline: Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vaithamanidhi Permual Temple (also called Thirukolur) is one of the nine Nava Tirupathi, the Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu.
overview.description: Vaithamanidhi Permual Temple (also called Thirukolur) is one of the nine Nava Tirupathi, the Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu. It is located on the village of Thirukkolur which is located on Thoothukudi district of Tamil Nadu, India. The village is 4 km away from Alwarthirunagari. It is the eighth temple of Nava Tirupathi, and is named after Mars (Sevvai) and also called Kuberasthalam.

topPlaces.name: Thirukkolur
topPlaces.description: Thirukkolur (or Thirukalur ) is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. The village is the location of the Sri Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple.

topPlaces.name: Irattai Thiruppathy
topPlaces.description: Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

topPlaces.name: Adinatha Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Adinatha Aazhwar Temple, or Adinatha Perumal Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu, situated in the town of Alwarthirunagari, Thoothukudi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 26 km from Tirunelveli.

topPlaces.name: Alwarthirunagari
topPlaces.description: Alwarthirunagari is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is next to Srivaikuntam on the Tirunelveli - Tiruchendur Highway, Tamil Nadu, southern India.

topPlaces.name: Makara Nedunkuzhaikathar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet saints, or Alvars.

topPlaces.name: Vellamadam
topPlaces.description: Vellamdam is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. It is situated 4 kilometers away from Nazareth, 32 kilometers away from Tirunelveli and 41 kilometers away from Thoothukudi.

topPlaces.name: Srivaikuntam
topPlaces.description: Srivaikuntam, also referred to as Thiruvaikuntam, is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the banks of the river Thamirabarani.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Assumption Church, Pragasapuram
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Assumption Church is a Roman Catholic church in Pragasapuram, India.

items.note: Thirukkolur (or Thirukalur ) is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. The village is the location of the Sri Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple.

Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

Sri Adinatha Aazhwar Temple, or Adinatha Perumal Temple, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu, situated in the town of Alwarthirunagari, Thoothukudi district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 26 km from Tirunelveli.
Alwarthirunagari is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is next to Srivaikuntam on the Tirunelveli - Tiruchendur Highway, Tamil Nadu, southern India.

The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet saints, or Alvars.
Vellamdam is a village in Thoothukudi district in Tamil Nadu. It is situated 4 kilometers away from Nazareth, 32 kilometers away from Tirunelveli and 41 kilometers away from Thoothukudi.
Srivaikuntam, also referred to as Thiruvaikuntam, is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the banks of the river Thamirabarani.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vaithamanidhi Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thirukkolur, Irattai Thiruppathy, Adinatha Perumal Temple, Alwarthirunagari, Makara Nedunkuzhaikathar Temple.
